query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%Photo%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%Photo%';
